hs_arbiter
module hs_arbiter #(
parameter 
Handshakes
 = 
2,
parameter 
logic 
ArbitrateLeaders
 = 
1'b0
)
(
hs_io
bus_hs,
input 
logic
 [Handshakes-1:0] 
mask_i,
output 
logic
 [Handshakes-1:0] 
mask_o
)
Ports
bus_hs
hs_io

signals for the active selected/masked handshake

mask_i
input logic [Handshakes-1:0]

unfiltered handshake req signals from all leader-side handshake buses

mask_o
output logic [Handshakes-1:0]

onehot mask for enabling the specified handshake bus_hs

Quinn Unger 03/July/2023
